variants.name: baseline
variants.description: Reference GraphSAGE baseline with bidirectional edges, State readout, and node-type embeddings.

variants.name: forward_edges
variants.description: Forward-only message passing while keeping the rest of the baseline fixed.

variants.name: mean_pool
variants.description: Mean-pooled graph readout instead of State-node readout.

variants.name: no_node_type
variants.description: Disable node-type embeddings while keeping the rest of the baseline fixed.
